title: Phase 34.4 — Final Production AdSense Verification Report
critical_discovery: Vercel edge cache was serving stale HTML. Homepage was statically generated at build time and cached. Fix: added 'export const dynamic = force-dynamic' to force SSR.
live_verification_method: curl raw HTML from www.qfinhub.com — confirmed 0 professional-grade, 0 i18n key leakage, 125 count consistent, clean footer links
remaining_risks: Thin how-to guides accessible but not in sitemap
AI Custom Calculator feature present but functional
